title: Tetra Technologies stock hits 52-week high at 11.9 USD By Investing.com
full_text: Tetra Technologies Inc. (TTI) stock reached a new 52-week high of $11.9 USD, reflecting a 152.14% increase over the past year. This surge is attributed to strong investor confidence, strategic initiatives, favorable industry conditions, and recent positive third-quarter earnings for 2025. Analysts have mixed views, with Clear Street downgrading to Hold (target $11.00) and Stifel maintaining Buy (target $13.00), in light of the company's performance and a new joint venture with Magrathea Metals, Inc.
